subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon in the earliest days, when they that dwelt in the realm of mortality turned away from Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم اذکر من اقبل الی الافق الاعلی فی اول الایام اذ اعرض عنه من فی ناسوت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
